title: Gendo how he was in his young age

wikitext:
[]: Gendo, how he was in his young age             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Wed Jun 23, 2010 6:50 pm http://questionablecontent.net/view.php?comic=1693 All according to the scenario :P

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Jun 23, 2010 6:52 pm He was exactly the same way he is now...only shorter. Also, I had no idea he liked WOW.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Jun 23, 2010 7:04 pm I saw this last night, didn't get it until you mentioned Gendo. I need to look at the comic titles more often...

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Wed Jun 23, 2010 8:32 pm Worse yet, he's Alliance scum. [/doesn't actually play WoW]

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sun Jun 27, 2010 8:13 pm I thought we agreed somewhere in a long dead thread that Gendo would only play EVE Online because there is no game more suited to a magnificent bastard.
